pi_items.source: Found hardcoded in /scripts/setup_openproject.sh which creates the environment state.
Found hardcoded in /scripts/setup_openproject.sh as a seeded work package.
Found hardcoded in /scripts/setup_openproject.sh as a seeded work package.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly specify 'follows' relation.
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly expect a lag of 2 days.
Task description instructs exactly these phrases and verifier.py uses them to score the comment.

privileged_info_summary: The environment seeds a synthetic 'ecommerce-platform' project with 'Implement product recommendation engine' and 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch' work packages. The task asks to create a 'follows' relation with a lag of 2 days between these two work packages, and add a comment containing the phrases 'Elasticsearch', 'stabilized', and 'search index', all of which are verified by the setup and verifier scripts.
